title: T-050 — Reference.AlertThresholds default seed (NPD-e)
prompt:
# T-050 — AlertThresholds default seed

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §11.3, §17.11.3 (margin warn ≤15%)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Seed the canonical default AlertThreshold rows (RED days, YELLOW days, margin warn percent) for every existing tenant via an idempotent seed script invoked from the migration runner.

## Implementation contract
1. Seed file packages/db/seed/alert-thresholds-seed.ts inserting per-tenant rows: ('launch_alert_red_days', 10), ('launch_alert_yellow_days', 21), ('costing_margin_warn_pct', 15) with ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, threshold_key) DO NOTHING (idempotent).
2. Hook into seed orchestrator packages/db/seed/index.ts so a fresh apex tenant gets thresholds.
3. Provide CLI helper 'pnpm --filter db seed:alert-thresholds' that re-runs for all tenants.

## Files
- packages/db/seed/alert-thresholds-seed.ts [create]
- packages/db/seed/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/package.json [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/alert-thresholds-seed.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fresh DB with one apex tenant, when seed:alert-thresholds runs, then 3 rows exist for that tenant with values (10, 21, 15) per §11.3 thresholds + §17.11.3 margin warn
2. Given the seed has already run, when seed:alert-thresholds runs again, then row count remains 3 and updated_at is unchanged (idempotent)
3. Given a second tenant is later created, when seed:alert-thresholds runs, then both tenants have the same 3 default rows

## Test strategy
- RED: integration test packages/db/__tests__/alert-thresholds-seed.test.ts asserting 3 rows + idempotency + multi-tenant before seed exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db seed:alert-thresholds && pnpm --filter db test alert-thresholds-seed'

## Risk red lines
- Do not use INSERT without ON CONFLICT (must be idempotent)
- Do not embed tenant IDs as hardcoded UUIDs (iterate tenants table)
- Do not seed per-FA overrides (out of scope)

pipeline_inputs.description: Idempotent seed of canonical RED/YELLOW launch alert + margin warn thresholds per tenant.
pipeline_inputs.details: Seed iterates tenants table and INSERTs 3 rows per tenant with ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. Hooked into seed orchestrator. CLI command exposed. Test verifies count + idempotency + multi-tenant.
out_of_scope: Do not implement per-FA override seeding
Do not seed Reference.NutritionTargets here (T-069 territory)
